not_a_verdict: Minimal, isolated provenance-classifier correction off current main. Builder receipt — SUBMITTED for independent verification (author != subject). NOT a PASS/HEALTHY verdict.

what_is_WIRED_into_the_live_projection.organic_only_liveness: probe_supabase_noos_loop -> derive_completion_provenance -> classify_loop_state. RUNNING_CONFIRMED requires a fresh ORGANIC completion.
what_is_WIRED_into_the_live_projection.successful_terminal_required: (§1) an organic row contributes to RUNNING_CONFIRMED ONLY if it is a SUCCESSFUL terminal (success status AND non-failing exit). A fresh-but-failed or mislabeled organic row does NOT confirm.
what_is_WIRED_into_the_live_projection.repair_is_repair_only: (§2) ONLY ORIGIN_REPAIR counts as repair-sustained (DEGRADED_REPAIR_SUSTAINED). local_reference/manual/test/replay/migration are separate non-production evidence and yield COMPLETION_UNPROVEN, never repair-masking.
what_is_WIRED_into_the_live_projection.canonical_status_vocabulary: (§3) DEGRADED_REPAIR_SUSTAINED / COMPLETION_UNPROVEN / EVIDENCE_INCONSISTENT -> BLOCKED_WITH_REASON; STOPPED_OR_IDLE -> IDLE_NO_WORK. execution_state, evidence_state and route are preserved on the result and in dashboard_findings.

what_is_NOT_wired.production_running_confirmed: DECLARED_NOT_WIRED (§4). It is a complete gate but is TEST-ONLY: its full inputs (producer allowlist, canonical execution plane, dispatch correlation, lifecycle validity) are NOT present in the trusted noetfield_factory_cycle_runs row. See production_gate_wiring_status(). No claim is made that the full live production gate is enforced.
what_is_NOT_wired.live_enforced_subset: receipt_origin=organic + successful terminal + freshness + repair-only-repair-sustained (the trustable subset).

live_probe_regression_tests: fresh repair + FAILED organic -> DEGRADED_REPAIR_SUSTAINED / BLOCKED_WITH_REASON
mislabeled organic (http_loop, exit!=0) -> COMPLETION_UNPROVEN, never RUNNING_CONFIRMED
deterministic_gate: python3 -m pytest tests/test_software_repair_provenance_v1.py tests/test_noos_motor_provenance_v1.py tests/test_noos_observability_semantics_v1.py tests/test_autorun_status_v1.py -q => 58 passed (local); full worktree suite 323 passed; CI test-and-gate is the independent gate on the PR.
real_cloud_blocker_unchanged: cloud http_loop restart -> actual organic completion rows -> three consecutive real cloud cycles -> independent verification remains EXTERNAL_ACTIVATION_REQUIRED. This correction does not substitute for it.
